name: Nutty Shrimp (or Chicken) Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 package A Taste of Thai Peanut Sauce Mix
1 can A Taste of Thai Coconut Milk (reg)
1 lb Cleaned medium shrimp or Bite-size Boneless/skinless chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring coconut milk to a boil.
2. Stir in the peanut sauce mix.
3. Add shrimp or chicken and cook until done.
4. Add bean sprouts.
5. Combine the sauce and prepared pasta.
6. Sprinkle with chopped peanuts and scallions.
